product.description: YeYe 3in1 offers an unforgettable taste that lingers in the hearts of many people around the world. Our Specially formulated coffee mix is targeted at consumers who would want to enjoy a cup of coffee at any time of the day.

metaData.Ingredients: Sugar, Creamer [Glucose Syrup, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil (Palm, Coconut), Sodium Caseinate (From Milk), Emulsifier (INS 471, INS 472e), Stabilisers (INS 340ii, INS 451i), Sugar, Anticaking Agent (INS 551), Salt, Thickener (INS 415)], Instant Coffee 4.1%, Maltodextrin, Chicory. Contains Milk.
metaData.Key Information: This blend of blend of coffee, non-dairy creamer and sugar provides a smooth & creamy mouthfeel with every cup.

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Non-Dairy Creamer, (Glucose Syrup Solids, Hydrogenated Vegetable Fat, Sodium Caseinate, Emulsifier, Stabilizer and Silicon Dioxide), Instant Coffee, Permitted Food Flavour, Emulsifier and Permitted Acidity Regulator - Sodium Bicarbonate
• The product contains traces of milk products
metaData.Key Information: OWL Regular Low Fat Instant 3in1 Coffee is a convenient cup of instant coffee with an authentic local taste inspired by the Straits Asian coffee heritage, created by carefully blending coffee, non dairy creamer and sugar. Enjoy the convenience of this 3in1 with a traditionally stronger taste. Made with a blend of spray-dried coffee, non-diary creamer and sugar that is smooth and easy on palate.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Add 150ml of warm water (80°C)
2. Stir well and serve
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.Ingredients:
Non-dairy Creamer (Glucose Syrup, Vegetable Fat [Palm, Coconut], Stabilizer [E340ii, E452i], Sodium Caseinate [Milk Protein], Acidity Regulator [E332i], Emulsifier [E471, E472e], Anticaking Agent [E551]) & Instant White Coffee
• Contains stabilliser, acidity regulator, emulsifier and anticaking agent as permitted food conditioner
metaData.Key Information: Finely roasted high grade coffee beans meticulously brewed to perfection and carefully blended with quality creamer to capture all the robust aroma, a richer taste, creamier and more satisfying. With rock sugar and contains no added artificial coffee flavouring.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Pour content into cup
2. Add 200ml of hot water
3. Stir and serve
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place
